name: Strombolis
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bread dough on a lightly greased baking sheet and press it into a rectangle measuring approximately 15 inches by 10 inches.
2. Arrange the ham slices lengthwise from the center of the dough.
3. Place the salami slices on top of the ham.
4. Sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon dried basil and 1/4 teaspoon dried oregano leaves.
5. Arrange the provolone cheese over the herbs and mozzarella cheese on top.
6. Top off with the remaining herbs.
7. Moisten all edges of the dough with water.
8. Fold each long edge of the dough to the center and press securely to seal.
9. Brush the dough with 1 tablespoon butter and sprinkle with cornmeal.
10. Carefully invert the stromboli onto a baking sheet.
11. Brush the top of the stromboli with the remaining butter.
12. Bake at 375°F for twenty minutes.
13. Serve with heated marinara sauce alongside.
